codeReview.summary: Email notification system implemented correctly with three templates (booking-confirmation, booking-cancellation, booking-hold-expired). All templates include procedure name, date/time, staff name, and applicant details. Integration into confirmCitizenBooking and cancelCitizenBooking is non-blocking with proper error logging. notification_delivery records are created with status tracking (pending→sent/failed). Test coverage includes all VAL-NOTIF assertions (004-007, 009-010).

issues.description: Duplicate 'Key behavior already implemented:' header appears twice in the file after line 190. The second occurrence (starting with '- **Email notifications on booking lifecycle events**:') is valid but the file has a minor formatting duplication.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Worker followed backend-domain-worker skill procedure correctly: wrote failing tests first, implemented to pass, verified with tsc and tests, and used Maildev for SMTP validation. No deviations noted in skillFeedback.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Handoff shows skillFeedback.followedProcedure: true with no deviations. Transcript skeleton shows the worker invoked mission-worker-base first then proceeded through the skill workflow.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Worker correctly updated BACKEND_STATUS.md as required by AGENTS.md governance rules for backend route/contract changes. The notification module section was added documenting the new email notification service.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: BACKEND_STATUS.md shows new section '2.6.1 Notification module' documenting sendBookingConfirmationEmail, sendBookingCancellationEmail, and sendHoldExpirationEmail functions.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Worker correctly used services from .factory/services.yaml: started backend on port 3001 and maildev on port 1080 for SMTP validation. Both services are defined in services.yaml.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Handoff interactiveChecks shows Maildev running on http://localhost:1080 and backend on http://localhost:3001 for email verification.

summary: The notification-email-templates feature is correctly implemented. Three email templates (confirmation, cancellation, hold expiration) with full booking details were added. Integration into confirmCitizenBooking and cancelCitizenBooking is non-blocking with proper error handling. notification_delivery records are created with status tracking through pending→sent/failed lifecycle. Tests cover all required VAL-NOTIF assertions (004-007, 009-010). The only minor issue is a duplicate header in BACKEND_STATUS.md which is non-blocking. Implementation fully satisfies the feature description and expected behavior.
